Excelente atención.

(Translated by Google)
I always fill up there on my trips to the capital.
Excellent service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNsaTVibW53RRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy buena estación.  Muy concurrida ,ya que se encuentra  en una de las avenidas más importantes  de buenos aires. Es normal hacer fila para cargar combustible. Vayan con paciencia. Sobre la full, sigue cerrada por obras hace meses.

(Translated by Google)
A very good station. Very busy, as it's located on one of Buenos Aires' most important avenues. It's normal to wait in line to fill up. Be patient. Regarding the full service station, it's been closed for months due to renovations.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNsZzhpLTdRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Fui a cargar un feriado, habia fila pero avanzó rapidisimo, buena atención y rápida 👍🏻

(Translated by Google)
I went to load on a holiday, there was a line but it moved very quickly, good service and fast 👍🏻

reviews.comment:
Es una estación Amiga mi padre carga desde hace muchos años y disfruto acompañarlo

(Translated by Google)
It's a friendly station; my father has been loading his cargo there for many years and I enjoy accompanying him.

reviews.comment:
Estacion de servicio en General Belgrano, en el centro,  pegado a las antiguas vias. Atención amable, con venta de café, bebidas frescas, sandwiches y golosinas. Los baños limpios y sin costo.

(Translated by Google)
Gas station in General Belgrano, downtown, next to the old train tracks. Friendly service, selling coffee, cold drinks, sandwiches, and sweets. Clean restrooms, free of charge.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNsN1BLNUpnEAE

reviews.comment:
Este es el ACA de palermo.
Siempre cargo Nafta allí, y nunca hubo faltante, ni aún en los días que realmente faltó.
La atención es muy buena.
Los playeros son muy serviciales y atentos.
Es un lugar muy espacioso y cómodo, y de paso si tenes tiempo te podes tomar algo en Full.

(Translated by Google)
This is the ACA gas station in Palermo. I always fill up there, and they've never run out, not even on the days when they were really short.
The service is excellent.
The attendants are very helpful and attentive.
It's a very spacious and comfortable place, and if you have time, you can grab a drink at Full while you're there.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURGOWYtWjdBRRAB
